alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google scaling global commercial operations, with product-ownership experience spanning requirements, logic design, UAT, rollout, and transformation programs; proven ability to manage cross-functional execution and drive adoption at scale
alignments.job_requirement: Deploy and scale AI solutions across enterprise customers; drive customer adoption and business impact

alignments.candidate_evidence: Directed LLM coding agents, owned evaluation methodology and benchmarking; designed and executed transformation programs that required translating technical capabilities into operational outcomes
alignments.job_requirement: Translate AI capabilities into customer business value; design solutions for customer workflows and problems

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led global commercial operations teams with cross-functional stakeholder management; managed territory budgets and revenue-leakage control; demonstrated ability to coordinate engineering partners on feature requests and implementation
alignments.job_requirement: Partner with customers, customer success, and internal teams to identify and solve business problems

alignments.candidate_evidence: Advanced Excel and Sheets; proficient SQL and BigQuery querying; builds Looker and Tableau dashboards; designs and specs systems for data-driven decision-making

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product-ownership background in transformation programs with UAT, rollout, and execution at scale; led scaling initiatives across global operations; managed implementation-heavy changes in commercial systems

gaps.gap: No hands-on AI product deployment or customer implementation experience; background is commercial operations and transformation, not services-delivery or AI-platform rollout
gaps.mitigation: Customer problem-solving, stakeholder coordination, change management, and adoption strategy from eight years of transformation work directly apply; can ramp on AI/LLM product domain through onboarding and cross-functional pairing with product and customer-success teams

gaps.gap: No consulting background or case-team experience; limited external customer-facing brand
gaps.mitigation: Eight years of internal cross-functional leadership, global team coordination, and transformation execution provide equivalent rigor for managing customer relationships and designing solutions; consultant skills are learned on the job

gaps.gap: Python is basic and actively learning; not a production developer
gaps.mitigation: Role is strategist/deployment lead, not engineer; data-analysis Python for workflow modeling and metrics is sufficient; can escalate technical questions to engineering and AI teams

gaps.gap: No explicit revenue operations or SaaS pipeline experience; Commercial Operations background may not fully map to Mistral's sales or revenue models
gaps.mitigation: Territory management, budget control, forecasting/reporting cadence, and pricing execution from Google commercial ops are transferable; customer value articulation will depend on Mistral's deployment and pricing strategy

output.level_rationale: JD title is "AI Deployment Strategist" with "Professional Services Operations" scope. no explicit years, management scope, or reporting line stated. Infer L4 (senior IC/lead level) based on deployment-strategy ownership, customer-partnership scope, and multi-stakeholder execution. company size/stage unknown, limiting confidence.
output.summary: Strong alignment on business problem-solving, stakeholder management, transformation execution, and data literacy; fits approved-stretch "deployment strategist" and "implementation-heavy AI transformation" families. Gaps: no direct AI/LLM product deployment experience in customer-facing roles, and no classic consulting/case-team brand. Candidate's operations, scaling, and adoption-leadership background translates well if Mistral prioritizes execution and business outcomes over AI engineering depth.
